toolSpec.name: lookup_events
toolSpec.description: Look up CloudTrail events based on various criteria.

start_time.description: Start time for event lookup (ISO format or relative like "1 day ago"). IMPORTANT: When using pagination (next_token), you must provide the exact same start_time as the original request.

end_time.description: End time for event lookup (ISO format or relative like "1 hour ago"). IMPORTANT: When using pagination (next_token), you must provide the exact same end_time as the original request.

attribute_value.description: Value to search for in the specified attribute

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (1-50, default: 10)

next_token.description: Token for pagination to fetch the next page of events. IMPORTANT: When using this token, all other parameters (start_time, end_time, attribute_key, attribute_value) must match exactly the original request that generated this token.

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to us-east-1.

toolSpec.name: lake_query
toolSpec.description: Execute a SQL query against CloudTrail Lake for complex analytics and filtering.

sql.description: SQL query to execute against CloudTrail Lake. IMPORTANT: You must include a valid Event Data Store (EDS) ID in the FROM clause of your SQL query. Use list_event_data_stores tool to get available EDS IDs first. CloudTrail Lake only supports SELECT statements using Trino-compatible SQL syntax. Example: SELECT * FROM 0233062b-51c6-4d18-8dec-a8c90da840d9 WHERE eventname = 'ConsoleLogin'

wait_for_completion.description: Whether to wait for query completion and return results. If False, returns immediately with query_id for manual result fetching using get_query_results. Default: True

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to us-east-1.

toolSpec.name: get_query_status
toolSpec.description: Get the status of a CloudTrail Lake query.

query_id.description: The ID of the query to check status for

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to us-east-1.

toolSpec.name: get_query_results
toolSpec.description: Get the results of a completed CloudTrail Lake query with pagination support.

query_id.description: The ID of the query to get results for

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return per page (1-50, default: 50)

next_token.description: Token for pagination to fetch the next page of results. Use the next_token returned from a previous call to get successive pages.

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to us-east-1.

toolSpec.name: list_event_data_stores
toolSpec.description: List available CloudTrail Lake Event Data Stores with their capabilities and event selectors.

include_details.description: Whether to include detailed event selector information (default: true)

region.description: AWS region to query. Defaults to us-east-1.
